claims.claim: Homepage publicly accessible and value proposition clearly stated
claims.evidence: Zed is a minimal code editor crafted for speed and collaboration with humans and AI.

claims.claim: Pricing page discoverable in 2 clicks from homepage
claims.evidence: The link to 'Pricing' is available directly on the homepage.

claims.claim: Documentation or live demo accessible without login
claims.evidence: The documentation is accessible without login at the URL https://zed.dev/docs/

claims.claim: Integration list or supported frameworks documented
claims.evidence: "Yes you can! We currently support Amazon Bedrock, Anthropic, GitHub Copilot, Deepseek, Google AI, LM Studio, Mistral, Ollama, OpenAI, OpenRouter, Vercel, and more."

claims.claim: Authentication / data handling claims publicly stated
claims.evidence: "When using third-party agents, nothing touches our servers. We never store or train on your code without explicit consent."
